## Safety Checklist

- [ ] This PR is phase-scoped and does not bundle unrelated P0 tasks.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, `.env` contents, runtime data, workload source, backups, or database files are committed.
- [ ] No Tailscale Funnel was enabled.
- [ ] No Cloudflare tunnel was started or enabled.
- [ ] No DNS records were created.
- [ ] No router ports were opened.
- [ ] No public route was exposed.
- [ ] Server-required evidence came from `oreochiserver`, or this PR only changes docs/templates.
